heading: Records: form; inspection; preservation

children.text: by rail carriers and lessors, including records related to movement of traffic and receipts and expenditures of money; and
by persons furnishing cars to or for a rail carrier providing transportation subject to the jurisdiction of the Board under this part to the extent related to those cars or that service.
inspect and examine the lands, buildings, and equipment of a rail carrier or lessor; and

children.label: A
children.text: a rail carrier, lessor, or association;

children.label: B
children.text: a person controlling, controlled by, or under common control with a rail carrier if the Board considers inspection relevant to that person’s relation to, or transaction with, that rail carrier; and

children.label: C
children.text: a person furnishing cars to or for a rail carrier if the Board prescribed the form of that record.

children.label: c
children.text: The Board may prescribe the time period during which operating, accounting, and financial records must be preserved by rail carriers, lessors, and persons furnishing cars.
